text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The Arima Kinen is here, but... Maruzensky is not.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I see just a flicker of hesitation in Grass Wonder's
eyes, and then she's back to acting her prim,
practiced self.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Well, now that all the preparations are complete,
it's about time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I glance at her feet and notice she has her
training shoes on.
choice_data_list: Shouldn't you change into your racing cleats?
Shouldn't you change into your racing cleats?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: M-my apologies. I'll put them on right away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without Maruzensky's footsteps to follow, Grass
Wonder looks unsure where to go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even so, the crowd roars—for the gates must
open, and the Arima Kinen must go on.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hello there, Sei. How are you feeling?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Decent, I guess? Same old, same old.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe. So you're in peak condition, then.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I should be off as well.
